rules.name: disable-enable-pair

rules.name: no-aggregating-enable

rules.name: no-unused-enable

rules.name: no-restricted-disable

rules.name: no-unused-disable
rules.notes: Deprecated upstream (use reportUnusedDisableDirectives). Approximation built on sourceCode.getDisableDirectives().problems; the upstream RuleTester suite needs the ESLint runtime, so the rule is covered by a synthetic-problem mechanism test (insta + Vitest) instead of the espree replay harness.

rules.name: no-forbidden-identifiers

rules.name: no-assigning-return-values

rules.name: no-async-tests
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc port of eslint-plugin-cypress/no-async-tests; async it/test callbacks containing cy/Cypress are covered in Vitest.

rules.name: no-chained-get
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc Cypress chain port of eslint-plugin-cypress/no-chained-get; nested get chains and valid single-get chains covered in Vitest.

rules.name: no-debug
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc port of eslint-plugin-cypress/no-debug; direct adapter and Oxlint jsPlugins CLI cases covered in Vitest.

rules.name: no-force
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc port of eslint-plugin-cypress/no-force; Cypress action commands with force options covered in Vitest.

rules.name: no-pause
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc port of eslint-plugin-cypress/no-pause; cy.pause and non-Cypress pause cases covered in Vitest.

rules.name: no-unnecessary-waiting
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc scope-aware port of eslint-plugin-cypress/no-unnecessary-waiting; numeric literals, const values, default parameters, aliases, and imports covered in Vitest.

rules.name: no-xpath
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc port of eslint-plugin-cypress/no-xpath; direct cy.xpath and non-Cypress receiver cases covered in Vitest.

rules.name: unsafe-to-chain-command

rules.name: only-export-components
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc parser port of eslint-plugin-react-refresh/only-export-components; covers native helpers, LSP-shaped diagnostics, and upstream-style valid/invalid cases through Oxlint jsPlugins.

rules.name: no-invalid-regexp
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc RegExp constructor and flag validation port of eslint-plugin-regexp/no-invalid-regexp; duplicate flags, incompatible u/v flags, and constructor parse errors covered in Vitest.

rules.name: no-empty-character-class
rules.notes: Rust pattern scanner port of eslint-plugin-regexp/no-empty-character-class for empty character classes in literals and static RegExp constructors.

rules.name: no-empty-group
rules.notes: Rust pattern scanner port of eslint-plugin-regexp/no-empty-group for empty capturing and non-capturing groups.

rules.name: no-empty-capturing-group
rules.notes: Rust pattern scanner port of eslint-plugin-regexp/no-empty-capturing-group for empty capturing groups.

rules.name: no-empty-alternative
rules.notes: Rust pattern scanner port of eslint-plugin-regexp/no-empty-alternative for leading, trailing, and adjacent empty alternatives.

rules.name: no-zero-quantifier
rules.notes: Rust pattern scanner port of eslint-plugin-regexp/no-zero-quantifier for {0} and {0,0} quantifiers.

rules.name: no-octal
rules.notes: Rust pattern scanner port of eslint-plugin-regexp/no-octal for octal escape sequences beginning with \0.

rules.name: no-control-character
rules.notes: Rust pattern scanner port of eslint-plugin-regexp/no-control-character for raw, escaped, or constructor-decoded control characters.

rules.name: sort-flags
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc flag scanner port of eslint-plugin-regexp/sort-flags for RegExp literals and static RegExp constructors.

rules.name: require-unicode-regexp
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc flag scanner port of eslint-plugin-regexp/require-unicode-regexp for regexps missing u or v flags.

rules.name: detect-bidi-characters
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc source scan port of eslint-plugin-security/detect-bidi-characters; upstream-style code/comment cases covered in Vitest.

rules.name: detect-buffer-noassert

rules.name: detect-child-process

rules.name: detect-disable-mustache-escape
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc AST port of eslint-plugin-security/detect-disable-mustache-escape; upstream valid/invalid cases covered in Vitest.

rules.name: detect-eval-with-expression
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc AST port of eslint-plugin-security/detect-eval-with-expression; upstream literal and identifier cases covered in Vitest.

rules.name: detect-new-buffer

rules.name: detect-no-csrf-before-method-override

rules.name: detect-non-literal-fs-filename

rules.name: detect-non-literal-regexp

rules.name: detect-non-literal-require

rules.name: detect-possible-timing-attacks

rules.name: detect-pseudoRandomBytes

rules.name: detect-unsafe-regex

rules.name: consistent-interface

rules.name: consistent-spacing-between-blocks

rules.name: exports

rules.notes: Rust/Oxc syntax-pattern port of eslint-plugin-perfectionist/sort-interfaces with focused interface member ordering coverage.

rules.name: sort-intersection-types
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc syntax-pattern port of eslint-plugin-perfectionist/sort-intersection-types with focused intersection member ordering coverage.

rules.name: sort-jsx-props
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc syntax-pattern port of eslint-plugin-perfectionist/sort-jsx-props with focused JSX prop ordering coverage.

rules.name: sort-maps
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc syntax-pattern port of eslint-plugin-perfectionist/sort-maps with focused Map entry ordering coverage.

rules.name: sort-modules
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc syntax-pattern port of eslint-plugin-perfectionist/sort-modules with focused top-level declaration ordering coverage.

rules.name: sort-named-exports
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc syntax-pattern port of eslint-plugin-perfectionist/sort-named-exports with focused named export specifier ordering coverage.

rules.name: sort-named-imports
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc syntax-pattern port of eslint-plugin-perfectionist/sort-named-imports with focused named import specifier ordering and oxlint jsPlugins coverage.

rules.name: sort-object-types
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc syntax-pattern port of eslint-plugin-perfectionist/sort-object-types with focused object type member ordering coverage.

rules.name: sort-objects
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc syntax-pattern port of eslint-plugin-perfectionist/sort-objects with focused object property ordering coverage.

rules.name: sort-sets
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc syntax-pattern port of eslint-plugin-perfectionist/sort-sets with focused Set entry ordering coverage.

rules.name: sort-switch-case
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc syntax-pattern port of eslint-plugin-perfectionist/sort-switch-case with focused case ordering coverage.

rules.name: sort-union-types
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc syntax-pattern port of eslint-plugin-perfectionist/sort-union-types with focused union member ordering coverage.

rules.name: sort-variable-declarations
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc syntax-pattern port of eslint-plugin-perfectionist/sort-variable-declarations with focused variable declarator ordering coverage.

rules.name: await-interactions
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc port of eslint-plugin-storybook/await-interactions; interaction call classification and native autofix ranges are covered in Vitest.

rules.name: context-in-play-function
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc port of eslint-plugin-storybook/context-in-play-function; play context propagation is covered in Vitest.

rules.name: csf-component
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc port of eslint-plugin-storybook/csf-component; default meta object resolution is shared with the other CSF rules.

rules.name: default-exports
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc port of eslint-plugin-storybook/default-exports; CSF4 skip, storiesOf skip, component-name inference, and native insertion fixes are covered in Vitest.

rules.name: hierarchy-separator
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc port of eslint-plugin-storybook/hierarchy-separator; title literal detection and replacement fixes are covered in Vitest.

rules.name: meta-inline-properties
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc port of eslint-plugin-storybook/meta-inline-properties; dynamic title and args properties are covered in Vitest.

rules.name: meta-satisfies-type
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc port of eslint-plugin-storybook/meta-satisfies-type; direct object, identifier meta, `as`, and variable annotation cases are covered in Vitest.

rules.name: no-redundant-story-name
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc port of eslint-plugin-storybook/no-redundant-story-name; CSF2 and CSF3 redundant story name checks and removal fixes are covered in Vitest.

rules.name: no-renderer-packages
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc port of eslint-plugin-storybook/no-renderer-packages; renderer-to-framework suggestions are covered in Vitest and oxlint jsPlugins.

rules.name: no-stories-of
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc port of eslint-plugin-storybook/no-stories-of; import specifier detection is covered in Vitest.

rules.name: no-title-property-in-meta
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc port of eslint-plugin-storybook/no-title-property-in-meta; meta title removal fixes are covered in Vitest.

rules.name: no-uninstalled-addons
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc port of eslint-plugin-storybook/no-uninstalled-addons; Storybook config addon extraction runs in native code while the JS adapter supplies package.json dependency names.

rules.name: prefer-pascal-case
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc port of eslint-plugin-storybook/prefer-pascal-case; story export filtering and native rename suggestions are covered in Vitest.

rules.name: story-exports
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc port of eslint-plugin-storybook/story-exports; named export collection and includeStories/excludeStories filters are covered in Vitest.

rules.name: use-storybook-expect
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc port of eslint-plugin-storybook/use-storybook-expect; Storybook expect imports and global expect calls are covered in Vitest.

rules.name: use-storybook-testing-library
rules.notes: Rust/Oxc port of eslint-plugin-storybook/use-storybook-testing-library; direct testing-library imports and native import rewrite fixes are covered in Vitest.
